alt: Comfortable Costa Line bus seat for rent
title: Costa Line Mexico North Central Station
content: Our ticket office at the Costa Line Mexico North Central Station is one of the busiest sales points, offering exceptional customer service. Here you can purchase tickets for all our destinations as well as get detailed information about Costa Line schedules and available services. The ticket office is located in an easily accessible area within the terminal, allowing for a quick and comfortable ticket purchase.

alt: Interior of a luxury rental bus in CDMX
title: Hours of operation
content: Our ticket office is open every day of the week, with extended hours to suit your needs. Whether you need to buy tickets early in the morning, in the afternoon, or even at night, you will find availability to make your purchase without worries. We want to ensure that your travel experience is as convenient as possible, so you will always have access to ticket purchases at the time that suits you best.

alt: Costa Line bus available for rent
title: Other ticket offices in major cities
content: Costa Line has ticket offices in the main cities and bus terminals across the country, all strategically located for your convenience. Whether in Guadalajara, Monterrey, or any other city, our ticket offices are designed to provide fast and efficient service, with trained staff to answer all your questions and travel needs. Find the nearest bus ticket office and check available schedules.

alt: Detail of a Costa Line bus seat for the best rental experience
title: Hours of operation
content: Each ticket office has specific hours designed to meet local needs and ensure you always have a convenient option to purchase your tickets. Additionally, we strive for each location to offer a fast and efficient experience, allowing you to find the best option without complications. Before traveling, check the available hours at your nearest ticket office and enjoy a service designed for your comfort.
